_meta.purpose: Index of NLPM rules / conventions that cite primary-source Claude Code documentation. Each top-level key is a doc URL. The auditor-docs-diff workflow fetches each URL weekly, hashes it, and opens an issue when content changes — listing the citations underneath so the maintainer knows exactly which rules to review.

<doc_url>.last_verified: ISO-8601 date the citation was last manually confirmed against the live doc

rules.section: human-readable label for the doc paragraph cited
rules.quote: exact quote from the doc that the rule depends on
references: repo-relative paths or slugs for the rule files that cite this URL
rules.introduced_in: NLPM version where this citation was added

rules.quote: name — Required: No. Display name for the skill. If omitted, uses the directory name. (Claude Code falls back to filename for command files.)
rules.history: Pre-v0.7.15 NLPM penalized missing `name:` on commands as a bug. Maintainer Jeffallan cited this URL on Jeffallan/claude-skills#184 (2026-05-07). The v0.7.15 fix had already corrected the rule; v0.7.30 added the citation so a future refine-rules cycle can't regress.
